stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the 'Night Effect'?

options.a: At night the ionosphere’s F-layer is insignificant and Very Low Frequency (VLF) / Very High Frequency (VHF) signals are returned by the D (and E) layers.
options.b: At night the ionosphere’s E-layer is insignificant and Low Frequency (LF) / Medium Frequency (MF) signals are returned by the D (and F) layers.
options.c: At night the ionosphere’s E( and F)layers are insignificant and Very Low Frequency (VLF) / Very High Frequency (VHF) signals are returned by the D-layer.
options.d: At night the ionosphere’s D-layer is insignificant and Low Frequency (LF) / Medium Frequency (MF) signals are returned by the E (and F)layers.
